title.description: Izina ry'porogaramu ryerekanwa mu mutwe. Porogaramu yo gusanga uburyo butandukanye bwo guteka ku isi.

subtitle.text: Sangiza uburyo bwo guteka buturutse impande zose z'isi
subtitle.description: Ijambo riri munsi y'izina ry'porogaramu mu mutwe.

heroTitle.description: Umutwe nyamukuru uri mu gice cya hero ku rupapuro rw'imbere.

heroSubtitle.text: Sura uburyo bw'ukuri bwo guteka buturutse mu byumba byo ku isi yose
heroSubtitle.description: Ijambo riri munsi y'umwanya w'umutwe ku rupapuro rw'imbere.

featuredTitle.description: Umutwe w'igice ugaragara hejuru y'amakarita y'uburyo bwo guteka.

cookingTime.description: Igihe cyo guteka kigaragazwa ku ikarita y'uburyo bwo guteka. {minutes} isimburwa n'umubare w'amasegonda.

difficulty.description: Icyapa kigaragazwa mbere y'urwego rw'ubugororangingo ku ikarita y'uburyo bwo guteka.

easy.description: Ikimenyetso cy'urwego rw'ubugororangingo kigaragaza ko uburyo bwo guteka ari bworoshye.

medium.description: Ikimenyetso cy'urwego rw'ubugororangingo kigaragaza ko uburyo bwo guteka bufite ubugororangingo buri hagati.

hard.description: Ikimenyetso cy'urwego rw'ubugororangingo kigaragaza ko uburyo bwo guteka ari bugoye.

ramenName.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Isupu y'imbavu z'ingurube itetse neza ifite inyama zoroshye za chashu, igi cyokeje gitekereje, n'udusenda dushya.
ramenDescription.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Pizza ya Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza gakondo yo muri Neapolitan ikozwe mu matomate ya San Marzano, mozzarella nshya, na basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Pizza ya Margherita.

tacosName.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos z'inyama z'ingurube zatekeye mu mavuta hamwe n'ipineapple, coriander, n'igitunguru ku mafunguro y'ibigori.
tacosDescription.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Inkoko ya Butter.

butterChickenDescription.text: Inkoko yoroshye mu isosi y'amatomate na beurre hamwe n'ibinyobwa by'imitunganyirize myiza y'ibinyomoro.
butterChickenDescription.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Inkoko ya Butter.

padThaiName.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Noodles z'umuceri zitetse mu mavuta hamwe na shrimp, tofu, ibinyomoro, na sosisi ya tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Crepes z'Abafaransa.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes zoroshye kandi zinononsoye zishyirwamo Nutella, amacunga mashya, n'ifu y'inkoko.
crepesDescription.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Crepes z'Abafaransa.

label.description: Icyapa cyorohereza guhindura ururimi mu mutwe.

en.description: Amahitamo y'ururimi rw'Icyongereza mu guhindura ururimi.

ja.description: Amahitamo y'ururimi rw'Igipapani mu guhindura ururimi.

es.description: Amahitamo y'ururimi rw'Icyesipanyolo mu guhindura ururimi.
